Nisha

From the friendship archives

Happy Birthday,
Nisha

Scroll slowly. Every petal on this page fell just for you — and a little angel is tagging along for the ride.

Est. 21 July

Begin↓
Happy Birthday Nisha✦ Red Roses, Always✦ Est. 21 July✦
01

Chapter One

A letter, first

Because some things deserve to be written down properly.

Dear Nisha,

Wishing you a very happy birthday! I hope your day is filled with cheerful moments, good company, and plenty of reasons to smile.

You have a lively personality that makes conversations more enjoyable and ordinary moments a little more fun. May the year ahead bring you new experiences, steady progress, and many pleasant memories.

This page — with its roses, petals, and words — is simply a small birthday gesture made for you. Take a moment to enjoy it, and have a wonderful day.

— Your friend

02

Chapter Two

A few wishes, saved for last

For the year ahead, I hope it brings you plenty of good moments and positive experiences.

  • Pleasant and easy-going days

    Good morning chai, enjoyable music, peaceful sunsets, and simple moments worth appreciating.

  • Progress and success

    May your efforts bring good results and help you move steadily toward your goals.

  • Plenty of laughter

    May you have many cheerful moments and good reasons to smile throughout the year.

  • Health and peace

    Wishing you good health, enough rest, positive energy, and a calm mind.

  • New experiences

    May the coming year bring interesting places, fresh opportunities, and pleasant memories.

03

Chapter Three

A Small Wish with High Standards

Filed formally, because some wishes deserve paperwork.

Wish no. 03 · Terms strictly non-negotiable

The Someone Wonderful Clause

03

Sealed · tap to open

Wish no. 03 · Terms strictly non-negotiable

May you find someone kind, caring, respectful — and naturally gifted with common sense and good texting skills.

Someone who matches your silly side, respects your space, and knows that “K” is a letter, not a proper reply.

Footnote · For the record

Just a timeless wish — with oddly specific standards.

Kidding, of course!

Wishing you a happy birthday
and a wonderful year ahead!

The finale

Close your eyes.
Make a wish.

Take a breath, think of something impossible, and press the button. The roses will handle the rest.

✦ ✦ ✦

Made with mischief, and too many roses to count — for Nisha.
Happiest birthday.
